chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Civil Revision Appln.No.S-36 of 2009. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 13.12.2021 Mr. Ghulam Dastagir A. Shahani, Advocate for the applicants. Mr. Abdul Rehman A. Bhutto, Advocate for private respondent. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, A.A.G. = * = * = * = * = * = The facts in brief necessary for disposal of instant civil application that the declaratory suit filed by private respondent was decreed by learned trial Court and appeal preferred against such decree by the applicants was dismissed by learned appellate Court; such dismissal of their appeal is impugned by the applicants before this Court by way of instant civil revision application. The perusal of record reveals that the issues have not been framed in accordance with pleadings advanced by the parties and the findings on certain issues have been recorded jointly by learned trial Court, which is contrary to the mandate contained by Rule to Order XX CPC. Learned counsel for the parties when were confronted with the above omission, were fair enough to consent for remand of the matter to learned trial Court. In view of above, the impugned judgments of learned trial and appellate Court are set aside with direction to learned trial Court to recast the issues in accordance with the pleadings advanced by the parties and then to proceed with the matter afresh in accordance with law. The instant civil revision application is disposed of accordingly, with no order as to costs.

In view of above, the impugned judgments of learned trial and appellate Court are set aside with direction to learned trial Court to recast the issues in accordance with the pleadings advanced by the parties and then to proceed with the matter afresh in accordance with law. The instant civil revision application is disposed of accordingly, with no order as to costs. JUDGE
